text.message: I can wait i have an eight bro
I was waiting on you genius
Was it mine? It seemed to be glitching on my end
Just deny the trade and everyone can move on
How is that on me lol, red can see
Bro, the person offering is who should be paying attention
I didn’t have cards so I went to take out the garbage
Oops, I'll be more aware in the future
Guess I’m still a solo from blue… 🤷🏻‍♂️
Can’t trade you the win lol
